hooks.description: N/A — no backend server process to restart. This is a purely static SPA (React + Vite). Vite's HMR handles client-side hot reload automatically during dev; no server restart is needed or appropriate. In production, Railway auto-deploys on push to main and runs 'serve -s dist' (a static file server with no stateful process that needs restarting). If a backend is ever added, replace this with: pkill -f 'node.*server' || true && npm run server &
